title: chukrasia tabularis var. velutina
intro: Chukrasia tabularis var. velutina, also known as the velvet chukrasia, is a species of tree native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive velvety leaves and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Chukrasia tabularis var. velutina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
